2ecda5c2-b9ba-40b2-8bd9-ad3117fda92c.name: Vedanta Hospital
2ecda5c2-b9ba-40b2-8bd9-ad3117fda92c.description: Vedanta Hospital is a multispecialty hospital & research centre in Kanpur, a unit of Kanpur Trauma and Ortho Centre (KTC'SVEDANTA). It originated from Kanpur Trauma and Ortho Centre started in 1999 by Dr. Govind Trivedi. The hospital offers 24x7 emergency and trauma services, 60 beds, round-the-clock pathology, X-ray, and has facilities including ICU with multi-parameter monitors, BiPAP and ventilators, ambulance with oxygen, under-ground parking, and OT suites with C-Arm. It is located in Arya Nagar, Kanpur.

3477b64c-a135-4493-9a32-3a7fc7d213da.description: Patiala-based Government Medical College; CanSupport trained selected faculty members from Government Medical College Patiala, as part of a Punjab Government-funded palliative care training program. Phase 3 training in Patiala involved administering palliative care to patients; Palliative Care OPDs and Indoor Facility established at Medical College Hospital Patiala; home-based palliative care in the district.

92dd37f1-293c-4b0b-bcb3-91cf8aa3e951.description: SCB Medical College’s cancer wing was established in 1971; a cobalt-60 teletherapy unit was started in 1972 and was the 8th cobalt-60 installation in India; the cancer wing expanded with surgical and chemotherapy services and was upgraded to Regional Cancer Research and Treatment Center (RCCTC) in 1981; the regional cancer center at SCB Medical College, Cuttack is mentioned as one of the ten regional cancer centers in the National Cancer Control Programme booklet (July 1984).
